description: Create a two-column content slide with a left-side survey prompt and headline, and a right-side horizontal bar chart comparing likely vs. unlikely by market for the statement that many more people will live their lives in virtual worlds.

header.headline: Many more people will live their lives in virtual worlds
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

left.body: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024
